description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear headphones with a sleek, modern design. The headband is padded and covered in a light gray material, providing comfort for extended use. The ear cups are large, circular, and cushioned with soft, light gray padding, enclosing the ears for noise isolation. The outer shell of the ear cups and the headband frame are finished in a metallic rose gold color, giving the headphones a stylish and premium appearance. Small physical buttons and ports are visible on the lower part of the ear cups, suggesting built-in controls and connectivity options. The headphones appear foldable or adjustable, suitable for portable use in urban environments.
description: A stylish pair of over-ear headphones with metallic rose gold accents and soft gray padding, featuring built-in controls and a comfortable padded headband.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing both ear cups, the padded headband, and the soft gray ear cushions.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the metallic rose gold outer shell of the ear cup and the headband's structure.
description_view_2: Direct front view displaying the open, circular ear cups and the full width of the headband.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the other ear cup's metallic shell and the headband's side profile.
